prompt: Does the facility require electric power for its core operations?
If electric supply is lost (without backup), how soon would the facility be severely impacted? (hours)
Once electric supply is lost (without backup), what percentage of normal business functions are lost or degraded?
How many hours can backup power sustain operations without refueling?
Once electric supply is lost (considering backup), what percentage of normal business functions are lost or degraded?
Once external service is restored, how long until full resumption of operations? (hours)
Can the facility identify electric utility provider(s)?
Can the facility identify the substation(s) serving the site?
Does the facility have more than one electric service connection?
Are service connections physically separated and independently routed into the facility?
Is at least one service connection capable of supporting core operations independently?
Are exterior electrical components protected from accidental/intentional damage?
Are exterior electrical components exposed to potential vehicle impact?
Does the facility have backup power available during loss of commercial power?
Are refueling/sustainment procedures established for extended backup operation?
Are backup power systems routinely tested under operational load?
Does the backup or alternate capability support all critical functions associated with this dependency?
Has the backup or alternate capability been tested or exercised?
Does the facility have established coordination with the electric utility provider for restoration?
Are restoration roles and coordination procedures defined for this dependency?
Does the facility require water service for its core operations?

Once external water service is restored, how long until full resumption of operations? (hours)
Can the facility identify water service provider(s)?
Can the facility identify and enumerate upstream water system assets?
Does the facility have multiple water service connections or sources?
Are water service connections physically separated and independently routed?
Is at least one connection capable of supporting core operations independently?
Are water infrastructure components protected from accidental/intentional damage?
Are water infrastructure components exposed to potential vehicle impact?
Does the facility have an alternate or secondary water source available?
Are resupply or sustainment procedures established for alternate water source operations?
Is the reliability of the alternate water source known and verified?
Does the facility have established coordination with the water service provider for restoration?
Does the backup or alternate capability support all critical functions associated with this dependency?
Has the backup or alternate capability been tested or exercised?
Are restoration roles and coordination procedures defined for this dependency?
